title: Fix is_local_mesh branching and downward SRH in gateway forwarding
description: Fix project-LICHEN-1877: Update forward_mesh_to_upstream in lichend.rs and gateway.rs to use routes map for is_local_mesh (link-local/ULA), add version check on dst parse (P1), implement SRH insertion for downward mesh-to-mesh path per spec/05-routing.md and RPL non-storing mode (P2). No comments in code. After every code chunk perform exactly 3 independent codereview passes by filing beads (P0-P4). Only close after 3 complete clean passes. Run cargo test and clippy at end before bd close. Touch only necessary files.
